Capture the beauty of Korea,
in your schedule

hair.section_desc: Select hair services like cut, perm, color, or clinic first.
hair.cut_desc: Basic hair cut for styling and length adjustment.
hair.perm_desc: Perm treatment for wave and volume.
hair.color_desc: Root touch-up, full color, or tone change.
hair.clinic_desc: Treatment for damage care and hair recovery.
hair.styling_desc: Dry, event styling, or final touch-ups.

nail.section_desc: Choose your desired nail style and type of care.
nail.care_desc: Basic care for cuticles, shape, and clean finish.
nail.gel_desc: One-color gel nail focusing on durability.
nail.art_desc: Design consultation from simple to detailed art.
nail.ext_desc: Nail extension for length and shape correction.
nail.rem_desc: Removal of existing gel, art, or extensions.

aesthetic.section_desc: Select treatment according to your skin condition and goals.
aesthetic.basic_desc: Basic skin care focusing on cleansing and hydration.
aesthetic.trouble_desc: Care focused on skin troubles and pores.
aesthetic.calming_desc: Calming care for sensitive and red skin.
aesthetic.lifting_desc: Lifting care for elasticity and contour.
aesthetic.bright_desc: Brightening care for dull skin tone.

eyelash.section_desc: Choose from extensions, perms, or care for your lashes.
eyelash.perm_desc: Eyelash perm for lift and eye design.
eyelash.ext_desc: Eyelash extension for length and volume.

makeup.section_desc: Select makeup services for daily, shooting, or wedding.
makeup.interview_desc: Clean and clear lookup for interviews.
makeup.shooting_desc: Makeup for studio or outdoor shooting.
makeup.special_desc: Point makeup for parties or events.

waxing.section_desc: Select waxing services for face, body, or brazilian.
waxing.body_desc: Back, chest, or body part waxing.

find_booking.q: Where can I check my booking?
find_booking.a: You can check all booking statuses on the My Bookings page.

staff_talk.a: You can communicate smoothly with local staff through Kello's interpretation service.

change_time.q: I want to change my booking time.
change_time.a: Please click the Change Time Request button on the booking details page.

cancel_refund.q: What are the cancellation and refund policies?
cancel_refund.a: Wekello applies a unified refund policy to all bookings. 4+ days before: 100% refund on the service fee. 3 days before: 80%. 2 days before: 60%. 1 day before or same day / No-show: no refund. The 10% platform fee is non-refundable in all cases.

write_review.q: How do I write a review?

help_page.title: Help Center

interp.papago_desc: Open Naver Papago for quick translation and text support.
interp.google_desc: Open Google Translate when you need another quick translation option.

lost.taxi_s1_d: Check the card company or vehicle number on the receipt to find the driver's contact info.
lost.taxi_s2_d: Call your card's customer center and ask for the merchant contact in the transaction history.
lost.taxi_s3_d: Use the vehicle number to find and contact the taxi company directly.
lost.taxi_s4_d: If none of the above work, call 112 or use the Lost112 website.
lost.subway_s1_d: If you just got off, visit the station office immediately and inform them of your car number.
lost.subway_s2_d: If time has passed, contact or visit the Lost & Found center for that line.
lost.subway_s3_d: Search or register your lost item online at the National Police Lost & Found Portal.
lost.airport_s1_d: Visit the airline or airport authority's lost property desk inside the airport first.
lost.airport_s2_d: For Incheon Airport, inquire at the luggage storage area on the 1st floor departure hall.
lost.airport_s3_d: Submit a lost item report online through the National Police Lost & Found Portal.
lost.street_s1_d: Ask nearby shops or check if any CCTV footage is available near where you lost the item.
lost.street_s2_d: File a lost item report at the nearest police station or call 112.
lost.street_s3_d: Registering on the National Police Lost & Found Portal means you'll be contacted when your item is found.

collection.title: 1. Collection and Use of Personal Information
collection.required_items: Name, Email, Reservation Info (Date, Time, Shop, Service), Social Login ID
collection.required_purpose: User Registration, Identification, Service Provision (Booking), Customer Consultation
collection.auto_items: IP Address, Cookies, Device Info, Service Usage Logs
collection.auto_purpose: Improving Service Quality and Preventing Fraud

retention.title: 2. Retention and Use Period
retention.content: In principle, personal information is retained until membership withdrawal. However, it may be kept for a period required by relevant laws if necessary.
retention.legal_basis: Compliance with relevant laws (e.g., E-commerce Act)

third_party.title: 3. Providing Personal Information to Third Parties
third_party.content: Wekello provides personal information to the following partners to facilitate service delivery.

overseas.title: 4. Overseas Transfer of Personal Information
overseas.log_items: Email, Profile Info, Service Usage Logs

destruction.title: 5. Destruction Procedure and Method
destruction.content: Personal information is destroyed immediately after the purpose is achieved. Electronic files are deleted using technical methods that make recovery impossible.

signup_consent.privacy_required: [Required] Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information

definitions.title: 1. Definition of Service
definitions.content: Wekello provides a beauty service reservation agency platform to facilitate bookings and communication between users and beauty service providers.

benefits.title: 2. Member Benefits
benefits.signup: New members receive a 5% discount coupon upon successful signup.
benefits.referral: When a new member joins using a referral code, both the referrer and referee receive a 5% discount coupon.

platform_fee.title: 3. Platform Fee
platform_fee.content: Wekello charges a platform fee of 10% of the service fee for its reservation agency service.
platform_fee.note: The platform fee is collected together with the service fee upon booking completion and is excluded from any refund under the cancellation policy.

refund_policy.title: 4. Cancellation & Refund Policy
refund_policy.subtitle: Refund rates apply to the service fee only. The 10% platform fee is non-refundable regardless of cancellation timing:
refund_policy.four_days: 4+ days before appointment: 100% service fee refund
refund_policy.three_days: 3 days before appointment: 80% service fee refund
refund_policy.two_days: 2 days before appointment: 60% service fee refund
refund_policy.note: Wekello's unified cancellation policy applies equally to all bookings made through the platform. No store-specific cancellation policy applies.

chargeback.title: 5. Payment Cancellation & Disputes
chargeback.content: By completing a booking payment, the customer is deemed to have explicitly agreed to this refund policy.
chargeback.note: If a chargeback is filed against a legitimate cancellation fee deduction made in accordance with this policy, Wekello reserves the right to dispute the chargeback using the customer's consent records and booking history as evidence.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.interpretation: The 'Real-time Interpretation' feature is a supplementary tool provided for user convenience. Wekello is not liable for reservation errors or disputes arising from inaccuracies in AI translation or manual interpretation.
liability.community: Wekello is not responsible for any damages, incidents, or disputes resulting from voluntary offline meetups or personal transactions between users conducted through the community features.

partner_signup.title: Apply as Partner
partner_signup.subtitle: Get featured to more travelers with Kello
partner_signup.info: Once submitted, you will be registered as a partner after admin approval. Approval may take 1–3 business days.
partner_signup.license_hint: Upload an image file (JPG, PNG) or PDF.
partner_signup.desc_placeholder: Briefly introduce your services and features...
partner_signup.success_body: Your partner application has been received. We will notify {email} after admin review. Approval may take 1–3 business days.
partner_signup.pending_notice: ⏳ Partner login is restricted until approval.
partner_signup.error_no_license: Please upload your business license or supporting document.
partner_signup.error_pending: This email already has a pending application. Please wait for admin approval.
partner_signup.error_approved: This email is already approved. Please use partner login.
partner_signup.error_exists: An application already exists for this email. Contact: admin@kello.app
